paper_title: WildGuard: Open One-Stop Moderation Tools for Safety Risks, Jailbreaks, and Refusals of LLMs
evaluation_method: Three binary classification tasks: (1) Prompt Harmfulness Detection (harmful/unharmful), (2) Response Harmfulness Detection (harmful/unharmful), (3) Refusal Detection (refusal/compliance). Fine-tuned Mistral-7B outputs classification labels.
